order.l2: If you study too much and don't sleep, you'll be stressed.
The doctor said I have to stop eating fast food.
She feels unfit because she never exercises.
He has insomnia and cannot get enough sleep.
She is very determined and never gives up.
He is ambitious and wants to be a famous scientist.
Make sure you drink lots of water every day.
She jumped into the river to save the child.

freewrite.prompt: Rewrite in the passive: Doctors discovered that exercise helps insomnia.
freewrite.broken: Doctors discovered that exercise helps insomnia.
a: It was discovered by doctors that exercise helps insomnia.
It was discovered that exercise helps insomnia.
freewrite.explanation: Passive with 'it': It was discovered (by agent) that + clause.

freewrite.prompt: Write a sentence using 'determined' to describe someone who keeps studying after failing a test.
a: She was determined and studied again after failing the test.
He was determined to pass and studied harder after failing.
She failed the test but was determined to improve.
He is very determined and never gives up, even after failing.
Despite failing, she remained determined and kept studying.
freewrite.explanation: Determined = never gives up. Use it as an adjective after 'was/is' or before a noun.

freewrite.prompt: Write one sentence using 'brave' about a person saving someone in danger.
a: She was brave and jumped into the river to save the child.
He was brave and ran into the burning building.
The brave firefighter saved three people from the fire.
She bravely jumped into the sea to save the swimmer.
It was brave of him to stand up to the bullies.
freewrite.explanation: Brave = not afraid of danger. Use as adjective (was brave) or before a noun (a brave person).

repair.broken: She don't exercise and eat a lot of unhealthy food.

errors.explanation: She (third person singular) takes doesn't, not don't.

a: She doesn't exercise and eats a lot of unhealthy food.

repair.broken: He is very determine and want to become a famous scientist.

errors.explanation: Determined is an adjective (past participle form). Not 'determine'.
He (third person singular) takes wants in present simple.

a: He is very determined and wants to become a famous scientist.

repair.broken: The doctor say she has insomnia because she work too much.

errors.explanation: Third person singular needs says (present) or said (past).
Third person singular needs works (present) or worked (past).

a: The doctor said she has insomnia because she works too much.
